_meta.what_firm_does: ElevenLabs is an AI audio company building voice synthesis, text-to-speech, dubbing, and conversational-voice models. Fast-scaling, AI-first, high-velocity culture; uses Ashby as its ATS.
_meta.jd_wants: Someone to build and run the recruiting operations engine — processes, automations, dashboards, ATS (Ashby) administration, and reporting — so recruiters and hiring managers can move fast without friction during hypergrowth.
_meta.status: DRAFT — Jamie to review/edit before submit

Why are you interested in Talent Operati: Talent Operations isn't just about scheduling interviews—from my experience, it's about building the processes, automations, and dashboards that make hiring run like a well-oiled machine and let recruiters and hiring managers move fast without friction. At InGenius Prep I design best-in-class SOPs and build workflow automations using AI tools — work that cut onboarding time by 75% — while managing the end-to-end lifecycle of 20+ programs and 10+ vendors at once and keeping the data clean across all of it. Juggling complexity while keeping things trustworthy is genuinely my comfort zone. ElevenLabs' AI-first, high-velocity culture and the chance to power the hiring engine through hyperscale are exactly the kind of build I want to be inside of.
What is your experience with recruiting: I have extensive administrative experience in Greenhouse — posting jobs, scheduling interviews, emailing candidates, and managing the talent pipeline and data — and I've also used Rippling, ADP, and SAP at the user level for standard HRIS tasks. At Kronos Research I became fluent in the recruiting workflows themselves, owning scheduling, coordination, and stakeholder management across the full hiring funnel, and grew applications by 566% in two months through personalized candidate outreach. I'll be candid that I haven't administered Ashby specifically, but the workflows map closely to Greenhouse, I pick up new platforms fast, and I'm genuinely eager to get deep in Ashby and build automations wherever they save the team time.
Tell us about a time you improved a proc: At InGenius Prep, our onboarding was inconsistent and information was scattered across teams. I interviewed stakeholders in structured listening sessions and turned that feedback into concrete data on where people were actually getting stuck — then used it to enhance the onboarding programs: tightening communications and improving how we tracked and organized our digital libraries so the information and onboarding steps were streamlined and far more efficient (onboarding time dropped 75%). I believe in using data — and increasingly AI tools — to drive process and strategy decisions rather than guessing, and that's the same discipline I'd bring to building reliable Talent operations at ElevenLabs: diagnose with the data, fix the real bottleneck, then keep refining.
Anything else you'd like us to know?: My approach is grounded in my MS in Applied Organizational Psychology (USC): I diagnose with data to find where a process breaks down, collaborate cross-functionally on the fix, and track metrics to make sure progress holds. I'm energized by move-fast, figure-it-out environments and by the chance to adopt cutting-edge Talent tooling rather than maintain legacy systems. As an analytical organizer with a growth mindset, I'd love to help build the operational backbone of ElevenLabs' hiring engine.
